title: elymus piperi
intro: Elymus piperi, also known as blue wildrye or piper's blue grass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus piperi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Elymus piperi is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be dried and used in herbal infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
